jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target compiler configuration with the unified release flag for Java 9+ module system compatibility.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' options are deprecated in favor of 'release' in newer JDKs and Maven compiler plugin versions; using 'release' ensures correct module path handling and prevents deprecation warnings or future removal issues.

jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate JAXB API dependency from javax.xml.bind to jakarta.xml.bind to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.xml.bind package was removed from the JDK and replaced by jakarta.xml.bind in Jakarta EE 9+; code or dependencies relying on the old namespace will fail to compile or link at runtime without this change.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run as Java 17 code, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version that supports the 'release' flag and Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may not support the 'release' flag or may fail to compile against Java 21 targets.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated 'source' and 'target' compiler configuration with the modern 'release' flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' flags are deprecated in newer JDKs and maven-compiler-plugin versions; using 'release' is required for correct cross-compilation and module path handling in Java 9+.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Guava dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Guava (e.g., 19.0) may contain bytecode or internal APIs incompatible with Java 21, leading to runtime errors or compilation issues.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Lombok dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Lombok (e.g., 1.18.22) do not support Java 21 syntax or bytecode, causing annotation processing failures or runtime errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update JaCoCo Maven plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of JaCoCo (e.g., 0.8.7) do not support Java 21 bytecode, causing instrumentation failures during test coverage execution.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate JAXB dependency from javax.xml.bind to jakarta.xml.bind namespace.
pom.xml.why_exists: Java 21 and modern frameworks (like Spring Boot 3.x) use the Jakarta EE namespace. The javax.xml.bind artifacts are either removed or deprecated, and using them may cause runtime NoClassDefFoundError or conflict with Jakarta-based dependencies.
